title: DCMS planned expenditure baseline allocations for 2011-2012
body: "This data set breaks down how our funding settlement will be allocated for the 2011/12 financial year, across our key programmes and activities (excluding expenditure on the Olympic and Paralympic Games).    DCMS planned expenditure baseline allocations for 2011-2012 (XLS 143kb)  DCMS planned expenditure baseline allocations for 2011-2012 (CSV 2kb)   ** Related information: **DCMS Business Plan 2011-2015 "
